data.title: Solo bitcoin miner wins $330K worth of block reward after renting hash power to beat steep odds, CKpool dev says
data.description:
Using CKpool solo mining software, a solo bitcoin miner beat 1 in 3,050 odds and claimed $330,386 in network rewards for solving a BTC block.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/357117/solo-bitcoin-miner-wins-330k-worth-of-block-reward-after-renting-hash-power-to-beat-steep-odds-ckpool-dev-says?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Nearly 35% of Pump creators earn less than $100, and only 1.8% earn more than $5,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SolanaFloor data, since Pump.fun launched the "Creator Income Sharing" plan on May 12, 3,566 creators have shared $3.07 million in revenue, but nearly 35% of creators have earned less than $100, and more than 83% of creators have earned less than $1,000.
The plan originally promised to return 50% of Pumpswap transaction fees to creators, but the agreement also raised the total transaction fee to 0.3%, of which the additional 0.05% was directly used for "creator income", causing the community to question its fee structure and incentive mechanism.
Data shows that creator income once reached more than $200,000 per day at its peak, and is currently stable at about $130,000 per day. The overall income is still far lower than that of liquidity providers (US$17.7 million) and Pumpswap itself (US$4.4 million) during the same period. There is a significant income gap between the top 10 creators, with the top user earning over $100,000, while the tenth one earns only a quarter of that.

data.title: South African Reserve Bank Appeals Court Ruling on Cryptocurrency Regulation
data.description:
According to PANews, the South African Reserve Bank (SARB) has appealed a High Court decision regarding the applicability of the 1961 Exchange Control Regulations to cryptocurrency oversight. The appeal, filed on June 2, follows a court ruling in a case involving a Standard Bank client, which determined that Bitcoin does not qualify as 'currency or foreign exchange' and that apartheid-era laws are not applicable to cryptocurrencies, which have only existed for 15 years. The SARB argues that the client's transfer of 4,400 bitcoins to a Seychelles-based exchange constitutes capital flight, and that Section 22C of the regulations grants the bank the authority to intercept such transactions. A local fintech company CEO highlighted that the case reveals loopholes in current policies that allow for the circumvention of exchange controls through cryptocurrencies
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/25205877973617?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: European Fund APS Acquires Tokenized Real Estate via MetaWealth
data.description: According to BlockBeats, European fund company APS, which manages $13.7 billion in assets, has purchased $3.4 million worth of tokenized real estate assets through the MetaWealth platform. This acquisition involves two residential properties in Italy and marks the first direct purchase of tokenized assets available to retail investors by an institution. MetaWealth has already tokenized over $50 million in European real estate, with users spanning 23 countries.

data.title: Bitcoin Holders Resume Accumulation After Brief Selling Phase
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Glassnode indicates that Bitcoin holders have shifted back to an accumulation trend following a brief period of selling. All wallet groups are exhibiting varying levels of purchasing activity, with the groups holding 10-100 BTC and those holding less than 1 BTC showing the strongest accumulation behavior. Both groups have reached the highest possible score of 1.0 in terms of accumulation.

data.title: OKX Wallet launches Hosico trading competition with a total prize pool of $40,000 worth of Hosico tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX Wallet has launched the Hosico trading event, which will be held from 18:00 on June 5, 2025 to 18:00 on June 12, 2025 (UTC+8). During the event, the winners of the yield ranking list and the top 300 users in terms of trading volume will receive rewards, and additional rewards can be won by inviting and sharing tasks. The total prize pool of the event is Hosico tokens worth US$40,000.

data.title: Bitget has issued monthly salary rewards for channels in May, with a maximum monthly reward of US$60,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget announced that it has completed the distribution of the channel monthly salary plan in May. This is the fifth distribution of monthly salary plan rewards this year, covering all eligible Chinese-speaking channel partners.
As an important part of Bitget's long-term channel incentive policy, the monthly salary plan does not require manual registration, and all Chinese-speaking channels participate by default. In addition to the regular monthly rebate, partners who meet the incentive rules can receive an additional monthly reward of up to 60,000 USDT.

data.title: Concerns Raised Over EIP-7702 Implementation in Cryptocurrency Wallets
data.description: According to PANews, SlowMist founder Yu Jian expressed concerns on the X platform regarding the implementation of EIP-7702 in cryptocurrency wallets. He stated that if wallets perfectly execute the expectations of EIP-7702, users could face significant risks, with over 99% of operations potentially being dangerous. Yu emphasized the critical role of wallets as the primary interface for cryptocurrency experiences, highlighting the importance of robust security infrastructure. He noted that without adequate security measures, wallets would be deemed inadequate. Yu plans to monitor EIP-7702 throughout the year, suggesting that if no beneficial applications emerge and gain popularity, the proposal might be considered ineffective.

data.title: Mastercard Ready To Abandon Manual Card Transactions For Tokenized Transactions By 2030
data.description:
Mastercard has revealed that almost half of its e-commerce transactions in Europe are now tokenised. In its 3 June 2025 press release, the company said that its goal is to support 100% tokenised e-commerce transactions by 2030. Brice van de Walle, Executive Vice President, Core Payments Europe Mastercard, said, “One year into our 100% tokenisation.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/mastercard-ready-to-abandon-manual-card-transactions-for-tokenized-transactions-by-2030/

data.title: Bitfinex: BTC Price Could Touch $115K by July on Institutional Demand, ETF Flows
data.description:
Bitcoin could climb to $115,000 or higher by early July, with institutional demand and ETF inflows driving the rally, according to analysts at Bitfinex.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitfinex-btc-price-could-touch-115k-by-july-on-institutional-demand-etf-flows/
